steps.t: Corunir is at Zudrugund. Halbarad wants you to tell Corunir to come back to Lhanuch.
Nár is in Zudrugund. Corunir, angered by the loss of his friends along the Forsaken Road, has forced Frithgeir to give Nár the strange-smelling brew o…
Corunir is at Zudrugund. You have spoken with Nár about a number of topics of interest to Corunir and should tell the Ranger what you have learned.
